pinpoint.inapptemplate.CfnAbout: Creates a message template that you can use to send in-app messages. A message template is a set of content and settings that you can define, save, and reuse in messages for any of your Amazon Pinpoint applications.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.Content.Description: An object that contains information about the content of an in-app message, including its title and body text, text colors, background colors, images, buttons, and behaviors.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.CustomConfig.Description: Custom data, in the form of key-value pairs, that is included in an in-app messaging payload.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.Layout.Description: A string that determines the appearance of the in-app message. You can specify one of the following:  + `BOTTOM_BANNER` – a message that appears as a banner at the bottom of the page.+ `TOP_BANNER` – a message that appears as a banner at the top of the page.+ `OVERLAYS` – a message that covers entire screen.+ `MOBILE_FEED` – a message that appears in a window in front of the page.+ `MIDDLE_BANNER` – a message that appears as a banner in the middle of the page.+ `CAROUSEL` – a scrollable layout of up to five unique messages.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

pinpoint.inapptemplate.TemplateDescripti.Description: An optional description of the in-app template.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.TemplateName.Description: The name of the in-app message template.
